Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for SF Public Administrator. Anthony Fleming and Mara Larsen-Fleming were also present.

The Court stated that Mr. Fleming's claim is in Alvin's estate and no in this estate. Mr. Weinkauf reported that the Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is ready to file. The distribution will be 50/50 to the Estate of Alvin Fleming and to Arnella Fleming. The status was continued to January 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Mr. Fleming to seek representation.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Continued To Jan-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Continued To Dec-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-07-289864 Estate of Alvin Fleming.

Appearances: Sally Gratz for San Francisco Public Guardian (Conservator). Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator. Nancy Rasch for Arnelle Fleming

The Court approved the preliminary distribution of the Middleton property and $30,000.00 in cash (subject to receipt of a proposed order). The Court authorized the Public Administrator to sell the New York and the New Jersey properties. Status of filing of a Petition for Final Distribution on Henry Fleming's Estate was set for December 5, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-07-289864 Estate of Alvin Fleming.

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court will construe Mr. Weinkauf's documents filed late last week as a petition under Probate Code 12200. The Court informed Mr. Weinkauf that he needs to notice it pursuant to Probate Code 12201. The matters were set for October 17, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
